title: "Application to Monitor Logs, system freezes"

### Post by johnathanamber on 2015-02-07
Hello,

I've been having some random freezing problems on my Ubuntu 14.10 installation. I've been patching as soon as things come out and this has seemed to have been introduced since the installation about two months ago, give or take. So, I've been noticing some content within the syslog that looks odd.
>
